message:
⚡ Lazy channel loading: instant startup with on-demand provider loading (#88)

Phase 0 (instant): Load providers, favorites, group names, vanity names,
and failover groups only. UI renders immediately showing Favorites.

On-demand: When user clicks a provider or sub-category in sidebar,
channels for that provider are loaded from DB at that moment.

Background: All provider channels load incrementally in the background
so 'All' view and search work progressively.

New DB queries:
- getProviderGroups(): GROUP BY query for sidebar group names (~400ms)
- getChannelsByIds(): Direct query for favorite channels by ID set
- getChannelsForProviderGroup(): Filtered by provider + group title

This eliminates the ~10s startup wait loading 324K channels upfront.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
